rebuckets_vs_raw_evidence_file.reason: Raw file rejected solely because 'T3 dentist_multi does not meet the corporate floor' (per assembly notes: 'mirrors r54 United Dental Centers, rejected on the same basis' as rank 83). Under ratified T3 policy (2026-07-02), dentist-owned multi-location IS merge-eligible. Evidence fully satisfies the T3 bar: exact-address own-locator confirmed (udcchicago.com lists 3540 E 118th St), named owner (Dr. David Fried / Dr. Kenneth Fried), 4-location family-owned group (1 IL + 3 IN), no MSO. Re-bucketed to merge_eligible_new T3.

Raw file downgraded from agent's merge_eligible_new to hold solely because T3 policy was undecided at time of assembly (assembly_adjustment: 'T3 dentist-owned multi-site does not meet [floor]; stricter-wins per AUTH → hold_needs_more_evidence; exact-address artifact preserved so Gate can promote if it rules single-LLC dentist multi-site groups count'). Gate now promotes under ratified T3 policy (2026-07-02). Evidence satisfies T3 bar at high confidence: exact-address own-locator confirmed (archerdentistry.com/chicago-booker-area/ lists '654 E 47th St, Chicago, IL 60653'), named owner (Dr. Hamza Mohammed on team page), 5-location group (4 IL + 1 IN), Chicago Dentistry LLC DBA Archer Dentistry Chicago, no MSO/PE found. The assembly explicitly preserved the artifact for this Gate decision.

Michigan Ave, Suite 200, Chicago, IL 60605' with matching phone), named sole owner (Dr. Alexander Reznikov DDS, founder), 2-location group (South Loop + Cityview Dental Arts, Bucktown, both confirmed on own website and LinkedIn), no MSO/PE.
